name: Tormentis
short_description: Build deadly castles, survive fast-paced action RPG combat, and hunt for legendary loot. Raid rivals, crush intruders, and fight your way up the seasonal leaderboard to claim the crown. Outsmart, outfight, and outlast every challenger!
detailed_description:
Tormentis is an action RPG that combines fast, loot-driven combat with the strategic construction of your own castle.

Build deadly defenses filled with traps, guardians, and clever room structures – and raid the castles of other players to claim valuable loot and secure your place in the seasonal leaderboard.



Design your own castle with individually placeable rooms, enemies, and traps. Strengthen your defenses to bring attackers to their knees – and secure resources and rewards in the process.

But be warned: your castle never rests. Other players will attempt to break through your defenses and steal your treasures. Only those who build cleverly, place strategically, and use their resources wisely will prevail as rulers of their castle.



Scour other players’ castles in action-packed battles from an isometric perspective. Dodge deadly traps, defeat their defenders, and claim their most valuable treasures.

With quick reflexes, smart tactics, and the right gear, you will survive your opponents’ defenses. Those who master the dangers will seize valuable resources and rare materials to continuously improve their equipment.



Plunder high-quality gear, enhance it with targeted use of resources and a touch of luck. Use the auction house or trade directly with other players to create your ideal build.

Experiment with different combinations of weapons, armor, and skills to perfect your playstyle. Every decision brings you closer to your ultimate build!



Every successful raid earns you trophies that improve your rank in the league. At the end of the season, exclusive rewards await the most successful players – defend your position or strike back!

Climb the ranks to compete with the best players. Each season brings new opportunities to place your name at the top of the league – and leave your rivals in awe of your castle and your strength.



  • Castle building with strategic depth
  • Action-packed battles in classic ARPG style
  • A wide variety of traps, monsters, and rooms
  • Loot system with legendary items
  • Item trading via auction house and direct exchange
  • Seasonal leaderboard with exclusive rewards
  • Adventure Mode to create countless castles and share them with other players

supported_languages:
English*, German*, French*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Russian*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Finnish*, Japanese*, Norwegian*, Swedish*, Turkish*
*languages with full audio support
